name: Clientele Limited
summary: Client√É¬®le Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides financial products and services in South Africa. It operates in three segments: Long-Term Insurance, Short-Term Insurance, and Other. The company underwrites, markets, and distributes insurance and investment products. It offers funeral, hospital, legal, and life insurance products; and provides estate preservation, wealth, investment, and credit life plans, as well as financial advisory services. The company also offers short-term insurance products, such as personal and business lines legal insurance policies. In addition, it provides rewards benefits to its clients from a range of retailers and service providers; and airtime and data to the CBC Rewards clients. Client√É¬®le Limited was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Morningside, South Africa. Client√É¬®le Limited is a subsidiary of Friedshelf 1577 Proprietary Limited.
